content.content:
1	<script setup lang="ts">
2	import { ref, watch, onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, shallowRef } from 'vue'
3	import loader from '@monaco-editor/loader'
4	import type * as Monaco from 'monaco-editor'
5	
6	const props = withDefaults(
7	  defineProps<{
8	    modelValue: string
9	    language?: string
10	    readOnly?: boolean
11	    height?: string
12	    width?: string
13	  }>(),
14	  {
15	    language: 'javascript',
16	    readOnly: false,
17	    height: '400px',
18	    width: '100%',
19	  },
20	)
21	
22	const emit = defineEmits<{
23	  'update:modelValue': [value: string]
24	}>()
25	
26	const editorContainer = ref<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
27	const editor = shallowRef<Monaco.editor.IStandaloneCodeEditor | null>(null)
28	let monacoInstance: typeof Monaco | null = null
29	
30	onMounted(async () => {
31	  // 配置 Monaco 使用国内 CDN
32	  loader.config({
33	    paths: {
34	      vs: 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/monaco-editor@0.45.0/min/vs'
35	    }
36	  })
37	  
38	  monacoInstance = await loader.init()
39	
40	  if (!editorContainer.value) return
41	
42	  editor.value = monacoInstance.editor.create(editorContainer.value, {
43	    value: props.modelValue,
44	    language: props.language,
45	    readOnly: props.readOnly,
46	    theme: 'vs',
47	    automaticLayout: true,
48	    minimap: { enabled: false },
49	    scrollBeyondLastLine: false,
50	    fontSize: 14,
